stories.title: SHEIN Recalls Michley Children's Pajamas — Burn Hazard, Flammability Violation

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
RECALL: SHEIN Michley children's pajamas — burn hazard. Flammability standard violation. ⚠️

Sizes 80–130. Sold SHEIN.com May–Dec 2025, ~$25. Stop use immediately. cpsc.gov #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
SHEIN Michley pajamas recall — action steps for families:

Stop use. Cut pajamas in half. Send photo to uscsteam@shein.com for a full refund. Sizes 80–130, sold SHEIN.com May–Dec 2025. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

article.headline: SHEIN Michley Children's Pajamas Recalled for Burn Hazard — What Colorado Springs Families Need to Know

stories.title: BABESIDE Doll and Stroller Toy Recalled — Choking Hazard for Under-3s

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
RECALL: BABESIDE Doll and Stroller toy — choking hazard for children under 3. ⚠️

~2,200 units sold on Amazon by HYBDOLLS. Small parts ban violation. Stop use now. cpsc.gov #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
BABESIDE Doll and Stroller recall — action steps, children under 3:

Cut bear in half. Write "X" on pacifier in marker. Send photo to support@babeside.com for free replacement. cpsc.gov #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

stories.title: COS 4th of July 2026 — America's 250th, 14 Days Away

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text: America's 250th birthday is 14 days away. Colorado Springs families have free and ticketed July 4 options — symphony with fireworks to community events with food trucks. 🎆 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
July 4 COS options:

Ford Amphitheater — symphony + fireworks (ticketed)
Rock Ledge Ranch — $7–13, free under 3
Banning Lewis Ranch — free, food trucks
Palmer Lake — free, fireworks 9:15 PM

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Bear Creek Nature Center Pollinator Celebration: Saturday June 26. $5/person. Bug sweeps, native pollinator education, hands-on learning. Bear Creek Regional Park, west Colorado Springs. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

stories.title: D20 Bus and Summer School Deadline — 10 Days Left, June 30

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: D20 families: 10 days until the June 30 bus registration and summer school deadline. Verify your address in Infinite Campus — wrong address, wrong bus. Assignments release August 1. asd20.org #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]
